title: Wiring Report
description: Structured output from the Wiring Expert after tracing and reviewing an implementation end-to-end

revision.description: Which review round this is (1 = first review, 2+ = re-review after fixes)

decision.description: APPROVED only when zero blocking findings remain AND trace is complete

summary.description: One sentence overall assessment of the wiring

trace.description: Required call trace proving the feature is reachable and connected end-to-end

entrypoint.description: file:line — where an external caller enters the feature (route, event, CLI, cron, etc.)

path.description: Ordered list of file:line steps through the call chain

terminal.description: file:line — where the feature produces its final effect (response, DB write, event emit, etc.)

findings.description: Individual wiring issues found. Empty array is valid on APPROVED.

severity.description: All wiring findings are at minimum warnings; broken connections are always blocking

file.description: Relative file path where the wiring issue is located

issue.description: What is disconnected, missing, or broken

fix.description: What must be added, changed, or removed to correct the wiring

resolved.description: Set to true on re-review when this finding has been satisfactorily addressed
